description: Gold: out-of-scope — a product/definition question, not a build intent. The behavioral proof is that no build path triggers: the agent answers directly and loads no build skills. Whether intent-recognition itself loads is left unasserted (mirrors meta-what-can-you-build). Ported from the intent-resolution spec (§5.11 meta-wf-vs-agent).

conversation.text: What's the difference between a workflow and an agent?

processExpectations: The agent answers the question directly by explaining the difference between workflows and agents, and does not create a workflow or an n8n Agent or start any build activity.
The agent does not load the workflow-builder or agent-builder skills and does not call any build tools in response to the question.
